cards.name: Knight of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: practical, reliable, efficient, stoic, slow and steady, hard-working, committed, patient, conservative

cards.name: Queen of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: selfish, unkempt, jealous, insecure, greedy, materialistic, gold digger, intolerant, self-absorbed, envious

cards.name: 3 of Swords
cards.interpretation: heartbreak, separation, sadness, grief, sorrow, upset, loss, trauma, tears
